rationale: In the citing paper, Jap and Ganesan (2000) appears only as part of a grouped citation in the discussion section, where the authors note prior evidence of possible counterbalancing effects between formal and informal governance. The cited paper is not used to build the core hypotheses, operationalization, empirical design, or interpretation of the main results. Its role is therefore background literature support rather than a distinct, functionally important anchor for this study.
